_comment: Example settings.json fragment after running ./install.sh against this repo. install.sh merges these keys into your existing settings.json; this file is for reference only.

statusLine._about: Points at the snap shim. The shim writes a sidecar file when CLAUDE_SNAP_SIDECAR is set (snap mode) and otherwise execs the command in $CLAUDE_SNAP_REAL_STATUSLINE so your normal TUI output is preserved.

hooks._about_stop: Stop fires once per turn after Claude finishes responding. The hook no-ops unless CLAUDE_SNAP_ENVELOPE is set in env, so regular interactive sessions are unaffected. When snap mode IS on, it polls for the post-response statusline tick, writes the final JSON envelope, and SIGTERMs the parent claude process so the TUI exits.
